name: Apple Temptation Cake
recipeInstructions:
CAKE: Preheat oven to 350°F. Grease and flour a bundt pan. Mix together the apples, cinnamon and cinnamon schnapps; set aside. Cream together the butter and sugar; add eggs and beat for 2 minutes. Add the remaining ingredients except apples and nuts; beat well. Drain liquid from apples and add to batter. Mix in apples and nuts. Pour into prepared bundt pan. Bake for 1 hour or until a toothpick inserted into the center comes out clean. Cool for 20-30 minutes.
GLAZE: In a saucepan, melt together butter, sugar, and water over medium heat. Stir in cinnamon schnapps and pour over cooled cake. Sprinkle with chopped nuts before serving.
